name: QA Workbench
description: Browser QA workbench that listens to BrowserTile evidence, requests snapshots, and packages a markdown report for agents or chat turns.
author: contex

chatSurfaces.label: QA Report
chatSurfaces.description: Attach the latest browser QA evidence report to the next chat turn.

actions.name: captureAll
actions.description: Request evidence snapshots from all known browser tiles.

actions.name: generateReport
actions.description: Generate a markdown QA report from collected browser evidence.

actions.name: getVisualFixHandoff
actions.description: Package QA/browser evidence into a Builder-ready visual fix handoff.
